title: Language Task
mic-select-text: Please select the microphone you want to use for the study. You will test it shortly and can return here if it doesn't work.
word-response-stimulus: Which word did you hear at the end of the sentence?
word-question:
Which word did you hear?


Press "Next" and then clearly and loudly say the word you heard. It can also just be a GUESS, but please don't guess randomly. If you didn't understand anything, please say "NOTHING".
clarity-question: How clearly did you hear the last word?
confidence-question: How confident are you in your answer?
explanation-pre-playback: You will hear a woman reading a sentence in which the last word will be somewhat unclear. Please press "Next" to hear the sentence.
explanation-post-playback: As you surely noticed, the last word was really unclear. Please listen to the sentence again. Then indicate how clearly you heard the last word.
end-of-first-tutorial-sentence: With that you've answered all questions regarding this sentence. Click "Next" to continue with the next sentence.
end-of-tutorial: Thank you very much! You've successfully completed the tutorial. The experiment will now begin.
pause-stimulus: Time for a short break. Click "Next" when you're ready for the next 50 sentences.
did-not-accept-message: You did not accept the consent form. This tab will now close.
mic-test: Please say a word to test your microphone. Speak loudly and clearly.
recording-check: Did you hear the word you recorded? If you want to try recording again press "Change microphone". If you want to hear the recording again press "Listen again". If you're finished setting up press "Next".
speaker-check: You will now hear a sentence. Please adjust your volume so you can understand the sentence clearly.
begin-training-session: You will now start the training session.
begin-titration:
We will now configure the experiment for your sensory threshold.

You will hear a sound which may or may not contain a word. Please answer the questions to the best of your ability.
language-detected-question: Did you hear language in the sample?
titration-typo-question: Is this the word you wanted to enter:

id.cityFirst: Select the first letter of the city you were born in:
id.citySecond: Select the second letter of the city you were born in:
id.motherFirst: Select the first letter of your Mother's first name:
id.motherSecond: Select the second letter of your Mother's first name:
id.birthSecondLast: Select the second last letter of your birth surname (last name):
id.birthLast: Select the last letter of your birth surname (last name):
